case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MCBRIDE, LORETTA

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-27-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-29-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
